definitions.text: Of a person or thing: in the midst of and surrounded by (other people or things).
examples: to put the cat among the pigeons
How can you speak with authority about their customs when you have never lived among them?

definitions.text: Associated with or living alongside (other people or things).
examples: How can you speak with authority about their customs when you have never lived among them?

definitions.text: Belonging to (a group comprising similar people or things).
examples: He is among the few who completely understand the subject.

definitions.text: At the same time, all the while, meanwhile.
